title: Giant Drops
description: Makes Giants drop Rotten Flesh on death
body:
Makes Giants drop 10-12 Rotten Flesh on death. They drop 6x the amount that Zombies do, since they're 6x the size.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/591b0172812044d08b1c07aaed8a946db1e72914.png)
